creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Emmanuel Vadot from comment #3)

FYI: The first build of latest (a.k.a. Ports Tree "default" here) has started
for releng/13.0 (a.k.a. Jail "130arm64" here):

Build
  adc6a8b51697
Server
  ampere1
Status
parallel_build:
Jail
  130arm64
Set
 default
Ports Tree
default
Build type
 Package
Start time
2021-12-11 10:47
Elapsed
8:37:22

It started with 32001 ports queued.

For reference,  the most recent 31781 port quarterly 130arm64 build took
81:29:49 on ampere1 and actually finished 29894 ports.

Of course, after the build there is more time distributing copies of the
build results around. That may well take longer than the build does.
